lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

sections.title: During Family Crest prior to talking to the man named Avan

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of a man named Avan Fitzharmon.

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al-Kharid recently someone around here will have though.

sections.title: After starting the Rogue Trader minigame

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: I don't trust him, not after he's sent his men round to threaten us.

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Did you know, we've had four different thugs come round and threaten us if we don't join them.

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: I've had hammers, rakes, swords and even scissors waved at me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will you do about it?

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: We'll carry on as normal with the store. Business as usual!

lines.speaker: Shop keeper
lines.text: Can I interest you in anything?
